name: Three Amigos
description: The Ainsworth Three Amigos is a vibrant Bonus Bonanza title presented on the tall A-Star cabinet with a portrait-oriented HD LCD and a brilliantly lit marquee topper. This Mexican-themed game features a four-tier progressive jackpot (Mini, Minor, Major, and Grand) along with free-game bonus rounds. Professionally refurbished and ready for home use on standard 110V household power.
highlights: Ainsworth A-Star upright cabinet with illuminated marquee topper
Portrait HD LCD display with Bonus Bonanza four-level progressives
Free spin bonus feature with themed Three Amigos symbols
Accepts bills with TITO ticket printer; keys and manual included
Plugs into standard 110V outlet; 30-day dealer warranty
